kinesisfirehose.deliverystream.encryptio: The `EncryptionConfiguration` property type specifies the encryption settings that Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose (Kinesis Data Firehose) uses when delivering data to Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3).

kinesisfirehose.deliverystream.encryptio.Description: The AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) encryption key that Amazon S3 uses to encrypt your data.

Disables encryption. For valid values, see the `NoEncryptionConfig` content for the [EncryptionConfiguration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/firehose/latest/APIReference/API_EncryptionConfiguration.html) data type in the *Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose API Reference*.
